course_history_note: Annual event at consistent venue. Rich course history (7-9 years). Expect 70%+ field coverage.

course_notes: Par-70, 6820y bentgrass birdie-fest. Light rough (0.95"). Fast greens (stimp 12). Winning score typically -15 to -20. Past champions: Cantlay, Burns, Straka, DeChambeau, Woodland.
winner_archetype: Iron player who converts on bentgrass. APP (150-200y) and PUTT dominant. Low OTT premium.
